title: koros #2884
definition:
1) a corus or cor, the largest Hebrew dry measure (i.e, for
    wheat, meal etc.) about 10 to 11 bushels (350 to 400 l)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a corus or cor, the largest Hebrew dry measure (i.e, for
    wheat, meal etc.) about 10 to 11 bushels (350 to 400 l)

    NASB:  a cor (a Heb. measure equiv. to about 15 bushels):
